zh.lifeSummary: 當Sofie Andersdatter Hvide於大約1292年出生在丹麥維波格時，她的父親Anders Stigsen Hvide29歲，母親Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi)28歲。她於大約1316年與Peder Pedersen Vendelbo在丹麥結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1380年在丹麥享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sofie Andersdatter Hvide于大约1292年出生在丹麦維波格时，她的父亲Anders Stigsen Hvide29岁，母亲Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi)28岁。她于大约1316年与Peder Pedersen Vendelbo在丹麦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1380年在丹麦享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hvide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Claus, Eberhard, Hans, Juergen, Markus, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish: variant of   Heid  .
Dutch: rare variant of Van der Heide (see Vanderheide ) and, in North America, (also) a shortened form of this.

variants.name: Heidi
meanings: German: variant (and also an Americanized form, to retain the second syllable) of   Heide  .

variants.name: Heider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto, Fritz, Gunter, Johann, Konrad, Kurt, Matthias, Willibald.

German and Swiss German: topographic name for a heath dweller, a variant of Heide + the -er suffix denoting an inhabitant; or a habitational name for someone from any of various places called Heide or Heidau (named with the same term); the placename is common in Silesia, Saxony, and Bohemia.

variants.name: Heid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Eckhart, Gerd, Gotthilf, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Kurt, Manfred, Ralf, Uli.
German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name from Middle High German heide, German Heide ‘heath, moor, open, uncultivated land’. Compare Heath .
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Haido, a short form of any of various compound names beginning with haid ‘heath’ (i.e. wasteland, often with heather).

variants.name: Heyde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Achim, Dietrich, Helmut, Volker.
German: topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, unprotected, open country, a variant of   Heide  .

variants.name: Hiday
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Heide  .

nameMeanings.name: Sofie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sophie
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sofie Andersdatter Hvide was born about 1292, in Viborg, Denmark, her father, Anders Stigsen Hvide, was 29 and her mother, Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), was 28. She married Peder Pedersen Vendelbo about 1316, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1380, in Denmark, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sofie Andersdatter Hvide est née environ 1292, à Viborg, Danemark, son père, Anders Stigsen Hvide, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Peder Pedersen Vendelbo environ 1316, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1380, à Danemark, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sofie Andersdatter Hvide um 1292 in Viborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anders Stigsen Hvide 29 und ihre Mutter Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi) 28. Sie hat um 1316 in Dänemark Peder Pedersen Vendelbo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1380 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sofie Andersdatter Hvide è nata il circa 1292 nel Viborg, Danimarca, sua padre, Anders Stigsen Hvide, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Peder Pedersen Vendelbo circa 1316, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1380, nel Danimarca, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sofie Andersdatter Hvideが約1292年にデンマークヴィボルグで生まれた時，父Anders Stigsen Hvideは29歳，母Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi)は28歳であった。約1316年にデンマークでPeder Pedersen Vendelboと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1380年にデンマークで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sofie Andersdatter Hvide(이)가 대략 1292년 덴마크 비볼그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anders Stigsen Hvide(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi)(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1316년 덴마크에서 Peder Pedersen Vendelbo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 덴마크에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1292–about 1380: tany ho any amin'ny 1292–tany ho any amin'ny 1380

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sofie Andersdatter Hvide nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Viborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, Anders Stigsen Hvide, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Peder Pedersen Vendelbo aproximadamente 1316, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1380, em Dinamarca, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sofie Andersdatter Hvide родилась около 1292 г. в местности виборг, Дания, её отцу по имени Anders Stigsen Hvide было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peder Pedersen Vendelbo около 1316 г. в местности Дания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1380 г. в местности Дания в возрасте 90 лет.

sm.about 1292–about 1380: e tusa o le 1292–e tusa o le 1380

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sofie Andersdatter Hvide nació aproximadamente 1292, en Viborg, Dinamarca, su papá, Anders Stigsen Hvide, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margrethe Nielsdatter (Landi), tenía 28 años. Se casó con Peder Pedersen Vendelbo aproximadamente 1316, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1380, en Dinamarca, a la edad de 90 años.
